_meta.author: jakobhoeg
_meta.title: useAutoScroll
_meta.description:
A React hook that provides automatic scrolling behavior for containers with dynamic content, particularly useful for chat interfaces, message lists, and real-time feeds.

Features
- Automatic scroll-to-bottom when new content is added
- Smart detection of user scroll interactions
- Configurable scroll offset threshold
- Smooth scrolling support
- Resize handling
- Manual scroll control
- Scroll state tracking
